title: Junior Master Data Specialist
description: EXCLUSIVE NETWORKS | Introduction Exclusive Networks (EXN) is a global cybersecurity specialist that provides partners and end customers with a wide range of services and product portfolios via proven routes to market. With offices in over 45 countries and the ability to serve customers in over 170 countries, we combine a local perspective with the scale and delivery of a single global organization.Our best-in-class vendor portfolio is carefully curated with all leading industry players. Our services range from managed security to specialist technical accreditation and training and capitalize on rapidly evolving technologies and changing business models. For more information visit www.exclusive-networks.com.At Exclusive Networks, we are passionate about making a difference. That means delivering the best to our clients, doing our part to create a prosperous and trusted digital world, and helping our people to realize their potential.DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES | About the role As The Junior Master Data Specialist You WillHelp to streamline the Data support process, ticket transparency and customer UX in maintaining central Master Data (Business Partners, SKUs, pricing))Setting and delivering of KPIs, and SLAs as agreed with the Business Data Team LeaderAdherence and reinforcement of the group ERP projects' Finance and IS Data Governance policiesBuilding strong relationship with country data stewards and country functional teamsCollaborate and communicate with Back End Tools teams (NetSuite, SAP) and colleagues to facilitate Data support and maintenance tasksAssist in the cleansing, translation, and migration of data so it can be effectively moved between ERP systems.Understand the usage and consumption of Data in the Companies chosen ERPCurate standard set of data migration templates, and country specific migration templates.Assistance with periodic pricing updates (many systems)QUALIFICATIONS AND EXPERIENCE | About you The Ideal Junior Master Data Specialist Will HaveBachelor / Master's degree or equivalent experience.Experience handling Data requests and Data Migration for user base in excess of 1000 in ERP & CRM Setups.ERP Data Steward Experience is mandatory - 3 years in maintaining Master Data (SAP and/or NetSuite appreciated)English, French fluency is a must. Written Arabic skills also a must havePersonality & SkillsExperience in International ERP Data Management and projects.Data Management, Data security and compliance experienceExperience working in a multicultural team with remote managementGood personal computer and business solutions software skills.High level understanding of Trading (order processing, logistic, invoicing) and Accounting processes.Expertise on CRM, OTC, P2P,R2R, AP/AR, GLStrong Analytical and Problem-solving skills required.Strong presentation/ communication / facilitation skills (oral and written).Capable of managing multiple objectives simultaneously.Self-motivated, requiring minimal direct supervision.Experience in IT Distribution or Supply Chain industry is a plus.SQL basics knowledge is a plusWHO IS EXCLUSIVE NETWORKS? | Why work for us We are people focused and strongly believe that talent empowers us to continue our dynasty of disruption and growth in the future. Our Mission is to drive the transition to a totally trusted digital world for all people and organizations. Visit our website www.exclusive networks.com.We are proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to the recruitment and hiring of individuals from diverse backgrounds and experiences, as we believe this strengthens our ability to develop superior solutions, make informed decisions, and better serve our valued customers. We do not discriminate against individuals on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, disability status, or any similar characteristic. Employment decisions are made solely on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Please click here to review our Diversity and Inclusion Policy for further information.We care about your data: please click here to read our Recruitment Data Protection Policy prior to applying, and therefore sharing your data with us.
